scripts.db:migrate:server:local: cd src && npm install --include=optional && npm run db:migrate:local -w @canadian-startup-jobs/web
scripts.db:migrate:server:remote: cd src && npm install --include=optional && npm run db:migrate:remote -w @canadian-startup-jobs/web
